HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION. New Delhi, the 22nd February, 2013 S.O. 426(E).-Whereas in exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the. National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), the Central Government by notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road Transport and Highway number S.O. 1610 (E), dated the 151 July, 2009 and having regard to the .expenditure involved in building, maintenance, management and operation of the Surat-Dhule-Nagpur Section of National Highway No. 6 with approaches near village Fekari, Taluka Bhusawal, District Jalgaon in Km. 399/00 in the State of Maharashtra (hereinafter ·referred to as the said section of National Highway No. 6), authorized M/s. Fekari Infrastructure Private Limited (hereinafter referred as Concessionaire) . for levying and collecting fee on mechanical vehicles for the use of the said section of National Highway No. 6 at the rates specified in its schedule. And whereas the Government of India in the Ministry of Road Transport and Highway has enterf!d into a Supplement8ry Agreement on February I, 2013 with the Concessionaire. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), the Government of India in the Ministry of Road Transport and Highway makes the following amendments in the Notification number S.O. 1610 (E), dated the 151 July, 2009: (i) The chainage Km. 390/00 shall be read as Km. 399/00. (ii) The Schedule shall be substituted as follows: SCHEDULE (Rates of fees to be recovered from the users of the said part of ROB and approaches on National Highway No. 6 near village Fekari, Taluka Bhusawal, District Jalgaon in Km. 399/00 in the State of Maharashtra) Period 1 2 3 4 5 Motor Motor Car, Bus Trucks, Heavy Vehicles such as Cycle, Taxi, Jeep, Tankers & Truck-Trailer combination, Scooter or Pick-up Van, multi-axle multi-axle vehicle with any other Station vehicle articulation other two Wagon, without mechanically propelled wheelers Tempo, other articulation vehicle not mentioned mechanical auto-driven above like mobile cranes ly Light dozers, earth movers, road propelled vehicles with rollers, containers. vehicle. Trailer. As per the NIL Rs. 10 Rs. 25 Rs.30 Rs.40 notification No. 1610 dated 1st July, 2009 from I 04/07/2009 to 31112/2012 01/01/2013 to NIL Rs. 10 Rs. 3o'J Rs. 35 R.~. 4" -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART [!_:_-SEC. 3(ii)J 01/12/2014 to NIL Rs. 10 Rs. 30 Rs. 35 Rs. 50 30/l 1/2016 01/12/2016 to NIL Rs. 15 Rs.35 Rs. 40 - Rs. 55 30/1 J/2018 0 III 2/2018 to NIL Rs. 15 Rs. 35 Rs. 45 Rs.60 30/11/2020 01/12/2020 to NIL Rs. 15 Rs. 40 Rs.50 Rs;65 ' 03/10/2022 -- This Notification shall come into force from the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. [F. No. NH-6-12037/55/99-MAHJ ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. r Foot Note:-The principal notification was published vide number S.O. 161 O(E), dated I st July, 2009.
